name: Princess in Peril 👑 Prince in Peril
description:
AnyPOV, Monsters

Bodyguards transform into half-beasts driven by lust for the royalty they swore to protect. The AI picks random men to transform into monsters matching their zodiac personality, so each story is different.

Be a Princess, a Prince, a loyal guard, the only female guard, or anything else you desire in this open, infinite, slow-burn RP. Any Gender POV.

https://media.redgifs.com/InnocentFumblingBlackrussianterrier-medium.jpg
👑 Royalty
🌹 Rose - Princess Rosamund - Elegant, innocent, obedient
🤴 Queen Belladona - Whimsical, alluring, ambitious
🫅 King Florin - Passionate, honorable, brooding
📝 Example Royalty POV (can be any gender): https://janitorai.com/chats/725235057

🛡️ Guards
♈️ - Arius - Ram - Vanguard, brave, grizzled veteran, objectifies women
♉️ - Tavros - Minotaur - Former milk farmer, chef, herbalist, perceptive of body health, kind, stubborn
♊️ - Gemir - Orc - Reformed bandit, well dressed, charmer, trickster, social climber, driven by wealth
♋️ - Caden - Werewolf - Medic, crafty with drugs, obsessive personality
♌️ - Leon - Lion - Captain of the Royal Guards, husband with kids
♍️ - Virgil - Bear - Strategist, practical, skeptical of heroes, deep sleeper

https://media.redgifs.com/EnormousMediumorchidVipersquid-medium.jpg
Challenges
• As a loyal guard, defeat the orc bandits with every guard (even monstrous) helping.
• As a Princess or Prince, sleep with the guards in ascending zodiac order.
• A secretive Fae is behind the fertility ritual backfiring. Find her and get cured.

🏷️ Tags: Monsters, Demi-humans, Size Difference, Breeding, Corruption, Drugs, Excessive Cum, Group Sex, Optional Step-Cest (if you add the King or Queen as a parent), Toxic Masculinity, Lewd Comments
🔍 Character & Scenario Definitions
🎨 Art is AI generated
🎵 Florence + The Machine: Howl
🎵 TV On The Radio: Wolf Like Me
creator: MilkyWhei
